description: Highest education levels among adults 21+ at household level
Household demographic composition and member counts
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION (
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID BIGINT,
	SOCIOECONOMIC_ID BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_ADULTS_22_PLUS_COUNT DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_MEN_COUNT DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Detailed household income from various sources
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES (
	HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_TOTAL_INCOME DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_FAMILY_FARM_INCOME DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_AGRICULTURAL_WAGE_INCOME DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_NON_AGRICULTURAL_WAGE_INCOME BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_SALARY_INCOME DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_NET_BUSINESS_INCOME BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_REMITTANCE_INCOME DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_GOVERNMENT_BENEFIT_INCOME BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_OTHER_INCOME_PROPERTY_PENSION_ETC BIGINT
);

description: Individual person demographic and employment information
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS (
	PERSON_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	PERSON_ROSTER_SEQUENCE_NUMBER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PERSON_GENDER VARCHAR(20),
	PERSON_RELATIONSHIP_TO_HOUSEHOLD_HEAD VARCHAR(30),
	PERSON_AGE_YEARS INTEGER,
	PERSON_MARITAL_STATUS VARCHAR(20),
	NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD DOUBLE PRECISION,
	WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR SMALLINT,
	WORKED_ON_FAMILY_FARM_INDICATOR SMALLINT,
	WORKED_IN_ANIMAL_CARE_INDICATOR SMALLINT,
	HEIGHT_MEASUREMENT BIGINT,
	HEIGHT_MEASUREMENT_POSITION BIGINT,
	WEIGHT_FIRST_MEASUREMENT DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Individual education details, enrollment, and attainment
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION (
	PERSON_EDUCATION_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	PERSON_ID BIGINT,
	EDUCATION_LITERACY_STATUS VARCHAR(30),
	EDUCATION_EVER_ATTENDED_SCHOOL VARCHAR(30),
	EDUCATION_CURRENTLY_ENROLLED VARCHAR(30),
	EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED INTEGER,
	EDUCATION_EVER_REPEATED_GRADE VARCHAR(30),
	EDUCATION_SECONDARY_CLASS_LEVEL VARCHAR(30),
	EDUCATION_POST_SECONDARY_SUBJECT VARCHAR(30),
	EDUCATION_COLLEGE_OR_VOCATIONAL_STATUS VARCHAR(30)
);
